blocked_claims.claim: BMW is leading the luxury EV transition
blocked_claims.blocked_reason: OWNERSHIP_OVERCLAIM: BMW has 12% visibility in Luxury EV Transition while Tesla owns the topic. Claiming ownership is not supported by Peec data.
blocked_claims.safe_rewrite: BMW brings luxury performance heritage into the electric era — the driving experience comes first, the powertrain follows
blocked_claims.next_evidence_to_collect: Publish explicit positioning content for this topic

blocked_claims.claim: BMW leads the premium SUV segment
blocked_claims.blocked_reason: OWNERSHIP_OVERCLAIM: BMW has 15% visibility in Premium SUV Segment while Mercedes-Benz owns the topic. Claiming ownership is not supported by Peec data.
blocked_claims.safe_rewrite: BMW’s X range offers a driving-focused alternative in the premium SUV segment, where competitors prioritize comfort over engagement
blocked_claims.next_evidence_to_collect: Improve schema markup and structured data for this topic

blocked_claims.claim: BMW’s i-Series is the best electric car lineup
blocked_claims.blocked_reason: OWNERSHIP_OVERCLAIM: BMW has 6% visibility in Electric i-Series while Tesla owns the topic. Claiming ownership is not supported by Peec data.
blocked_claims.safe_rewrite: The BMW i4 delivers rear-wheel-drive precision and a driver-focused cockpit in an all-electric package
blocked_claims.next_evidence_to_collect: Increase editorial and public coverage for this topic
